data.title: Seven calls between Milei and a LIBRA backer on launch night, revealed in phone logs amid Argentina probe.
data.description: The latest findings from Argentina's federal investigation into LIBRA contradict Milei's assertion of having no connections to the meme coin, potentially entangling him in the controversy.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Singapore Gulf Bank/
data.description: Singapore Gulf Bank has recently become a part of BNY's Correspondent Banking Network and Fixed Income Brokerage Platform. The partnership was officially announced on April 7, 2026. This collaboration brings together two leading financial institutions to enhance their services. The change was highlighted in a news release sent out by Singapore Gulf Bank over PR Newswire. This updated release provides all the corrected information regarding the partnership. This development marks a significant milestone for both companies as they aim to leverage each other's strengths.

data.title: NEW FLAVORS ARRIVE THIS SEASON AT TEXAS DE BRAZIL
data.description: Indulge in the vibrant flavors of Brazil with Texas de Brazil's latest menu additions. Moqueca de Peixe and Grilled Shrimp are now available as part of the second-quarter offerings. Experience the bold Brazilian classics at their Dallas location. This limited-time menu features traditional dishes that showcase the rich culinary heritage of Brazil. Don't miss the chance to savor these exquisite creations during the season.

data.title: BNB price may hit $650-$763 by Q4 2026 despite current bearish trend. Analysts eye $763+ with $596 as key support.
data.description: Binance Coin is currently trading at $596, showcasing conflicting signals as analysts have set their sights on targets exceeding $763. However, technical indicators indicate a potential period of consolidation in the near term, particularly around critical support levels. The price prediction for BNB suggests potential targets reaching $765.

data.title: World-Class Amputee Soccer Comes to Washington, D.C. for the Inaugural McCourt Global Amputee Soccer Invitational
data.description: On Sunday, April 19th, Georgetown University's Shaw Field will host a free event showcasing elite international and U.S. amputee soccer. Players from Olympique de Marseille and the American Amputee Soccer Association, including representatives from Arena Football Club (Delaware), will participate. The event is open to the public and will feature talented amputee soccer players from around the world.

data.title: VICTORIA'S SECRET AND TWO-TIME WNBA ALL-STAR, ANGEL REESE, LAUNCH THE SEASON OF STRAPLESS CAMPAIGN & COLLECTION
data.description: In a groundbreaking move, a top-tier player in the WNBA has become the inaugural athlete to feature in a Victoria's Secret promotional campaign. The campaign showcases the brand's latest summer collection, which includes sizzling items such as strapless bras, swimwear, and beauty products. This historic event took place in New York City on April 7, 2026, marking a milestone for both Victoria's Secret and the world of sports and fashion.

data.title: InventHelp Inventors Develop New Cup Holder for Mobility Walkers (HOF-841)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on April 7, 2026, two inventors from Dickinson, Texas, introduced the innovative WALKER CUP HOLDER. This device offers a secure and efficient solution for storing and carrying a beverage cup and cell phone while using a walker. The design aims to provide convenience and safety by allowing users to have both hands free.

data.title: Amidst high oil prices and volatile stocks, companies are making deals driven by federal antitrust approvals.
data.description: According to banking professionals, corporations are facing up to increased oil costs and fluctuating stock prices in order to take advantage of the favorable attitude of federal antitrust regulators towards approving mergers.

data.title: FTK Construction Services Expands Multifamily Project Focus
data.description: FTK Construction Services, based in Allen, Texas, has announced a nationwide sales initiative with a focus on expanding into new markets and undergoing restructuring. The company is aiming to boost its sales efforts across the country to capitalize on growth opportunities. The initiative will involve targeting new regions and adjusting internal operations to accommodate the expansion.

TRUMP IN “MODE OF DEFIANCE,” OFFICIAL SAYS A senior administration official described Trump as proud of the airman rescue and in a “mode of defiance.” He remains open to diplomacy but is focused on maximum pressure on Iran, with no decisions yet on actions if a deal isn’t reached tonight.

data.title: Virtu Financial to Host Conference Call Announcing First Quarter 2026 Results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Virtu Financial, Inc. (NYSE:VIRT), a prominent global financial services provider, is set to reveal its first-quarter 2026 outcomes on April 29, 2026, prior to the US market opening. Virtu Financial, Inc. offers diverse financial services worldwide, catering to various assets, providing liquidity, and introducing transparent products within the entire investment cycle. The announcement will shed light on the company's performance during this crucial period, offering insights into its standing within the global markets. This disclosure is anticipated to provide valuable information to investors and industry analysts, shaping expectations and potentially influencing market trends.
